runners.formComment: Continued winning form with another impressive display after running them ragged to make it two on the trot at this track over 515m (29.98). Looks a key chance on recent form.

runners.formComment: Scored by half a length last time (29.71) in a Grade 7 over 515m at this track. Yet to win but has placed two times from this draw. Expected to go close.

runners.formComment: Effortless winner to score by 7 lengths in a Grade 7 last start at The Meadows, recording a dazzling 29.69 for the 525m journey. In form and looks tough to beat again.

runners.formComment: Missed the frame last time when fourth (29.84) at this track. Prior to that had been racing well. Tricky draw to overcome and prefer each-way.

runners.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 435m at Sale. Tempted to look elsewhere.

runners.formComment: Solid performance after tracking the speed to win by one length at Ballarat over 450m (25.33) beating Paw Prydi in Mix 6/7 on April 8. Needs to find a bit more.

runners.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Sale to win by 6 lengths in 24.40, beating Dr. Smokey. Last start finished last over 460m at Warragul beaten 7 lengths (26.32) behind Reality Ollie in a Restricted WIN H on April 7. Mixing his form but shapes as a genuine contender under these conditions.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Galloped in back straight fell and lost ground.
Checked, contacted into first turn and tailed off.
